metadata.description: Claude Code and Codex plugins by Sour Old Geezer: skills for code auditing, review, and development workflows, with Claude Code subagents and Codex metadata where supported.

plugins.name: souroldgeezer-audit
plugins.description: Rubric-driven audits for DevSecOps posture and test quality, with per-stack extensions, matching Claude Code subagents, and Codex skill metadata.

plugins.name: souroldgeezer-design
plugins.description: Reference-driven design for modern web UIs, serverless HTTP APIs, and ArchiMate® architecture models — build, review, extract, and look up responsive interfaces (WCAG 2.2 AA, i18n, Core Web Vitals), serverless APIs (security, contract discipline, reliability, observability) across Azure Functions .NET, Cosmos DB, and Blob Storage, and ArchiMate 3.2 enterprise / solution architecture (serialised as OEF XML per The Open Group ArchiMate Model Exchange File Format 3.2, loadable in ArchiMate-conformant tools, with layered extract from .NET solutions, Bicep, host.json, staticwebapp.config.json, and GitHub Actions workflows), with composable per-stack extensions, canonical-path drift detection across sibling skills, the Sugiyama-v1 layout engine for cookbook-quality OEF output (deterministic 3-tier procedure with per-viewpoint specialisations, zero runtime deps), the architecture-design process-view emission contract (one §9.7 Business Process Cooperation view per feature plus one §9.3 Service Realization drill-down per orchestrator-level Business Process — introduced in 0.9.0), matching Claude Code subagents, and Codex skill metadata.
